markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.115 — Fees for Driving Safety Course

(a) A driving safety course may not be provided to a student for less than $25.

(b) A course provider shall charge each student a fee for course materials and for overseeing and administering the course. The fee may not be less than $3.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.106(g), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A driving safety course may not be provided to a student for less than $25.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A course provider shall charge each student a fee for course materials and for overseeing and administering the course. The fee may not be less than $3.
